<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Voice; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class Sim extends TwiML { /** * Sim constructor. * * @param string $simSid SIM SID */ public function __construct($simSid) { parent::__construct('Sim', $simSid); } }
